name: Potato and Bologna Scallop
recipeIngredient: 1 can cheddar cheese soup (or cream of mushroom soup, or celery soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cubed bologna and sliced potatoes in a shallow 6-quart casserole dish.
2. Cook the frozen peas according to package instructions.
3. Add the soup (cheddar cheese soup or cream of mushroom soup or celery soup), milk, onion, and sage to the peas. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Stir in grated cheddar cheese.
5. Pour the cheese sauce over the bologna and potatoes.
6. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, or until bubbly and hot.
7. Serve 4 servings.
